claims.claim: Together-AI: S2S natively better at interruptions/barge-in because full-duplex (produce audio while receiving); cascading pipeline needs complex engineering

claims.claim: Mechanism: the audio input task is never paused for agent playback so the mic keeps being read during playback
claims.found: push_audio (544) has no guard on agent-speaking state; it always sends frames to stt_pipeline.audio_ch, _vad_ch and _interruption_ch. No pause/gate on playback observed.

summary: All 6 checkable assertions verified against ground truth. Both deepgram-ebook quotes match the raw parsed PDF at the cited lines (572-573, 737-748, 2043-2049). together-talk line 38 matches the summary AND the raw youtube transcript verbatim in meaning. The single code_ref (audio_recognition.py:152) correctly points to _audio_input_atask declaration, and push_audio (544) confirms the 'never paused for playback' mechanism. No miscitations, no wrong claims.
